episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Chinese people are dangerous pedestrians because they never look up from their phones.
Bad Chinese driving implies traffic danger, but reveals worse walking.

2.premise: A phone-distracted pedestrian is like a remote-control car because both keep bouncing into obstacles.

1.premise: "Metrosexual" can mean stylish urban man or someone having sex in the metro.

lines.text: -Well, I just came from Shanghai.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm sorry if some of my humor doesn't land,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: but I'm used to talking to people who don't speak English.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So if you don't mind, I'm going to talk a little bit
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: about some Chinese problems.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: If you people think that they don't drive well over here,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you should see how they walk.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: There's this one guy, he walked into me about 10 times.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's kind of like those remote cars
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when they bump into something.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He just, "Yee-yah, boom, yee-yah, boom."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: They don't even look up from their phone.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: They just keep on bouncing into your ass
lines.label: tag

lines.text: until they just burn out.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: The other problem is they got a lot of metrosexuals out there.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Does anyone know what a metrosexual is?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: If you don't know what a Metro's...
lines.label: setup

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Calm down, Americans. Calm down.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Stand on your head and calm down, like the police say.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So put your hands in the air, stand on your head and calm down.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: No. Calm down, sir.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You need to -- No.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: What they do is, in the Metro, if you're walking around
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and you don't know what a Metrosexual is,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: just watch who's bouncing off of the poles.
lines.label: punchline
